pages.title: User Funnel | User Engagement
pages.key_finding: While user stickiness showed a positive trend, increasing to 14.3% in March, the overall user base contracted significantly, with Monthly Active Users falling from 37 to 21. Additionally, a steep drop-off between total clicks (644) and actual players (252) suggests considerable friction in the onboarding process that needs to be addressed.

pages.title: Game Performance (Score)
pages.key_finding: Game performance continued a downward trajectory, with the average daily score plunging by 57.7% from 28,986 in February to 12,265 in March, indicating a severe contraction in daily player activity.

pages.title: Game Performance (Time)
pages.key_finding: Player engagement duration mirrored the decline in scores, as the average daily playtime fell sharply by 53.3% to 15 minutes, highlighting a broader challenge in sustaining user interest over the month.

pages.title: Most-played stages | Most-cooked menus
pages.key_finding: Users demonstrated a strong preference for routine comfort meals, prominently featuring 'Umami Daily' as the most played stage and 'โจ๊กหมู' as the most frequently cooked menu item.

pages.title: Top Score (Leaderboard)
pages.key_finding: The leaderboard shows highly concentrated engagement among top players, led by 'Tae Tualek' who secured a dominant high score of 534,990, followed by 'ชมภูนุช995' at 392,510.
